results.name: vol_regime_mid
results.desc: Trade only the middle ATR%-percentile band (skip calm & shock)

results.name: skip_vol_shock
results.desc: Skip top-decile ATR% (news-shock) entries

results.name: vol_contraction
results.desc: NR7-style: enter only after a volatility squeeze

results.name: no_climax_entry
results.desc: Skip climax-volume trigger bars (no knife-catching)

results.name: relvol_participation
results.desc: Require volume >= 1.2x avg at signal

results.name: relvol_quiet
results.desc: A/B: only quiet (below-avg volume) entries

results.name: pullback_in_trend
results.desc: With-trend entries only after a pullback past the fast EMA

results.name: clean_trend
results.desc: Only when 50/800-EMA gap >= 1 ATR (untangled trend)

results.name: skip_overextended
results.desc: Skip entries >2.5 ATR stretched from the 50-EMA

results.name: deeper_retrace
results.desc: Execution: 0.5-ATR limit retrace (better price, fewer fills)

results.name: shallow_retrace
results.desc: Execution: 0.12-ATR limit retrace (more fills, worse price)

results.name: fast_timestop
results.desc: Execution: 12-bar time stop (cut dead trades faster)

results.name: slow_timestop
results.desc: Execution: 48-bar time stop (more room for 3R)

results.name: highvol_bigtarget
results.desc: Regime: high-vol bars -> 4R target

results.name: lowvol_smalltarget
results.desc: Regime: low-vol bars -> 2R target

results.name: voltarget_size
results.desc: Sizing: volatility-targeted (down in high vol)

results.name: size_by_confluence
results.desc: Sizing: scale by confluence strength

results.name: round_number_entry
results.desc: Entry location: near psychological round numbers

results.name: variance_ratio_trend
results.desc: Regime: Lo-MacKinlay variance ratio > 1 (trending only)

results.name: clean_trend_stack
results.desc: Regime: 10-bar monotonic EMA stack + widening gap

results.name: coil_rng_pct
results.desc: Coil: prior-bar range in bottom quintile of trailing-50

results.name: atr_band_3085
results.desc: Regime: ATR%-percentile band 0.30..0.85 (wider band)

results.name: ret_autocorr_pos
results.desc: Regime: 48-bar return autocorrelation > 0

results.name: climax_dir_veto
results.desc: Veto only climax bars moving with the trade direction

results.name: pullback_run2
results.desc: With-trend entry after >=2 counter-trend closes

results.name: wider_stop
results.desc: Execution: 2.0-ATR stop, 3R target

results.name: tighter_stop
results.desc: Execution: 1.0-ATR stop, 3R target

results.name: entry_window_long
results.desc: Execution: 12-bar limit-fill window

results.name: entry_window_short
results.desc: Execution: 3-bar limit-fill window

results.name: target_5r
results.desc: Execution: 5R target everywhere

results.name: vol_dryup_coil
results.desc: Coil + volume dry-up (accumulation tell)

results.name: inside_bar
results.desc: Prior bar is an inside bar (compression)

results.name: conf_60
results.desc: Stricter >=60% confluence threshold

results.name: trend_strong_sep
results.desc: Strong trend: 13/800-EMA gap >= 2 ATR

results.name: two_bar_momentum
results.desc: Two consecutive with-direction closes

results.name: range_expansion
results.desc: Trigger-bar range > 1.5x trailing-20 avg

results.name: ret_percentile_self
results.desc: Own-momentum percentile (24-bar ROC vs trailing-500)

results.name: near_high_recovery
results.desc: Within 5% of the 50-bar extreme (not in drawdown)

results.name: run_streak_gate
results.desc: 2-5 consecutive same-direction closes

results.name: jump_continuation
results.desc: Impulse bar (TR>1.8 ATR) + extreme takeout

results.name: atr_vs_tr_compression
results.desc: Latest TR <= 0.7x smoothed ATR (contraction)

results.name: ema50_slope_accel
results.desc: EMA50 slope aligned AND accelerating

results.name: structural_stop_swing
results.desc: 1.5-ATR stop lands just beyond nearest swing

results.name: contraction_reclaim
results.desc: 2-bar range contraction then prior-close reclaim

results.name: exit_trail_3atr
results.desc: Execution: 3-ATR chandelier trailing stop

results.name: exit_mae_giveup
results.desc: Execution: MAE give-up (0.8R offside by bar 6, no 0.5R fav)

results.name: exit_time_decay
results.desc: Execution: target decays 3R->1.5R over 24 bars

results.desc: KudbeeX read: shooting-star@upper / hammer@lower BB(26,2) reversal

results.desc: KudbeeX fast-fail: exit if not +0.5R by bar 3 (cuts loss tail)

results.name: exit_tight_showme
results.desc: KudbeeX fast-fail: 1.0 stop + exit if not +0.3R by bar 2
